channel.title: tools on The Blog of Suzl 🤠
channel.description: Recent content in tools on The Blog of Suzl 🤠

item.title: Get to know vim
item.description: Get to Learn Vim in order to be a an awesome ‘geek’, i’d like to learn the ancient editor. :/ this is gonna be cool :D edit i insert a append o open a line below I INSERT before line O append before line A APPEND AFTER LINE shift + zz :wq write and quit modes normal mode insert mode command mode visual mode in insert mode ctrl + h to delete a char ctrl + w to delete a word crtl + u to delete a line These three shotcuts also works in shell or a terminal!
